case_title: ROBERT J. PRIMUS VS. ALBERT OTIS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIMUS,ROBERT,J. AS TO DEFENDANT OTIS, ALBERT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
DECLARATION DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF THE PROPERTY AT 4636-4640 THIRD STREET $86.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIMUS,ROBERT,J.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT OTIS, ALBERT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT OTIS, ALBERT
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $151.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT OTIS, ALBERT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OTIS, ALBERT
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIMUS,ROBERT,J.
